name.description: Override the package / bin name. Defaults to a kebab-case form of info.title.

baseUrl.description: Override the API base URL. Falls back to servers[0].url.

clientId.description: OAuth client ID; never derivable from the spec.

schemeId.description: Spec security-scheme id to target when multiple oauth2.authorizationCode flows are declared.

redirectPort.description: Loopback port used as the OAuth redirect URI. Defaults to 8848.

scopes.description: Scope override. Defaults to the union of per-op scopes referencing the chosen oauth2 scheme.

clientSecretEnv.description: Env var the generated CLI reads at runtime for the client secret. When set, the CLI sends `Authorization: Basic` on every token-endpoint call (treats the client as confidential). Required for IdPs that mandate client auth for RFC 8693 token exchange (e.g. Keycloak 26 standard token exchange).
